calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Aug-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 8/3/26 for the next biennial CIU report to be completed and also because the issues posted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 12/17/25 have not yet been addressed and no courtesy copy of any papers filed since 12/9/25 has been received by the assigned examiner. (No earlier availability.)

NB: The Notice of Hearing must have a printout of the instructions for how to appear remotely ATTACHED to the notice that is served on all interested parties.

NEW DEADLINE to provide courtesy copies of any papers filed after 12/9/25 to the assigned examiner is 7/20/26.
Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

(NB: Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and DIVIDED FROM THE REST OF THE DOCUMENT PAGE BY A PRINTED LINE. [CRC 2.110(a).]

EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
